# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-Stage Deployment Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build Artifacts
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      artifact-name: build-output
    steps:
      - name: Checkout source
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Build application
        run: |
          mkdir -p dist
          echo "Build output for commit $GITHUB_SHA" > dist/app.txt
          chmod +x dist/app.txt

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output
          path: dist/
          if-no-files-found: error
          retention-days: 7

  deploy_staging:
    name: Deploy to Staging
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    environment:
      name: staging
    steps:
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output
          path: artifacts/

      - name: Prepare deployment script
        run: |
          mkdir -p scripts
          cat > scripts/deploy-staging.sh <<'EOF'
          #!/usr/bin/env bash
          set -euo pipefail
          echo "Deploying to staging..."
          ls -la artifacts
          cat artifacts/app.txt
          echo "Staging deployment complete."
          EOF
          chmod +x scripts/deploy-staging.sh

      - name: Execute staging deployment
        run: ./scripts/deploy-staging.sh

  deploy_production:
    name: Deploy to Production
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: deploy_staging
    environment:
      name: production
    steps:
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output
          path: artifacts/

      - name: Prepare deployment script
        run: |
          mkdir -p scripts
          cat > scripts/deploy-production.sh <<'EOF'
          #!/usr/bin/env bash
          set -euo pipefail
          echo "Deploying to production..."
          ls -la artifacts
          cat artifacts/app.txt
          echo "Production deployment complete."
          EOF
          chmod +x scripts/deploy-production.sh

      - name: Execute production deployment
        run: ./scripts/deploy-production.sh
